name: rep-penalty
description: L1 (item 16): anti-repetition sampling. Sets repetition_penalty=1.1 + repetition_context_size=20 (the mlx-lm 0.31.3 server reads BOTH from the request body; no_repeat_ngram_size is NOT supported and silently dropped, so it is not used). Wire path verified live 2026-06-24: opencode's @ai-sdk/openai-compatible provider serialises repetition_penalty top-level into the request body (scratchpad wire_check.py). Targets the degenerate decode-loop mode (repeated planning sentence); note that mode was 0/8 in L0, so this is a cheap config-only experiment, not the lead lever. Temperature left at baseline so the effect is attributable to anti-repetition alone.
